title: useMemo – Memoizing Expensive Calculations
description: Cache the result of expensive functions.

slides.title: Memoize Values, Not Just Components 🧮
useMemo for Object Stability
slides.content: Even if an object is created with the same values, it's a new reference, causing memoized children to re‑render. `useMemo` stabilizes the reference.

quizData.question: When does useMemo recompute the cached value?
quizData.explanation: useMemo recomputes when any dependency in the array changes.
